query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS code_backups (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  backupId VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  url VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  sizeKB INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  fileCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS code_backups (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  backupId VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  url VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  sizeKB INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  fileCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
);
